mapper.insert: INSERT INTO review (REVIEW_ID, RECIPE_CODE, ID, REVIEW_CONTENT, THUMBS_UP) VALUES (#{reviewId}, #{recipeCode}, #{id}, #{reviewContent}, #{thumbsUp})
mapper.select: SELECT REVIEW_ID AS reviewId, RECIPE_CODE AS recipeCode, ID AS id, REVIEW_CONTENT AS reviewContent, THUMBS_UP AS thumbsUp, REG_DATE AS regDate FROM review WHERE RECIPE_CODE = #{RECIPE_CODE} ORDER BY REG_DATE DESC
SELECT REVIEW_ID AS reviewId, RECIPE_CODE AS recipeCode, ID AS id, REVIEW_CONTENT AS reviewContent, THUMBS_UP AS thumbsUp, REG_DATE AS regDate FROM review WHERE ID = #{ID} ORDER BY REG_DATE DESC
